title: penstemon ovatus
intro: Penstemon ovatus, also known as the Ovate Beardtongue, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States. This plant contains flavonoids and iridoids, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Penstemon ovatus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Penstemon ovatus can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
